items.claim: Patty Pimblett possesses a wild fighting style.
items.quote: Patty does got that wild [ __ ] bro.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is a high-level threat within the top 15 of his division.
items.quote: Nikita Krillov is a good top 15 threat.

items.claim: The fight between Bobby Green and Terrence McKinney is a 50/50 matchup.
items.quote: McKenna and Green seems like a 50/50.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney possesses a dangerous, quick finishing ability.
items.quote: It's just that quick slime out from McKenna is live.
